Today's weather seems incapable of fazing any of the 
eighteen runners facing this autumn's Tenno Sho.

I mustn't linger too far to the outside, lest I have a repeat 
of the Takarazuka Kinen…

I absolutely must get a good position before the first 
corner!
Glory awaits one racer at the finish…

Mejiro McQueen takes a brilliant spot right out of the 
gate — shooting ahead to snatch an early lead!
Okay, all I need to do is keep this positioning!

As the race continues to develop, Mejiro McQueen 
fearlessly braves the rain and maintains third place!

Our runners pass the big zelkova tree and enter the final 
stretch!
I've got my ideal position… and energy to spare.
No one can take this from me!
She dashes to the outside to take the lead!

The runners behind her attempt to keep up, but McQueen 
is gone!

Incredible! What strength! She's completely left them 
behind!

Mejiro McQueen reigns supreme with consecutive spring 
and autumn Tenno Sho victories!

Mejiro McQueen fulfills all fan expectations as our shining 
star!
And McQueen breaks into the inside!
